planned_quiet_window.source: Jason advised current Plex viewers should be finished at 9pm Melbourne time.

queued_steps: Verify active Plex sessions are zero for two consecutive checks.
Verify Sentinel is PASS/LOW or REVIEW/MEDIUM and command launch is healthy.
Create or refresh a visible verified Watch Now lane from already-passing titles.
Run bounded playback-path verification for the Watch Now lane using detached/local runner only.
If playback lane passes, prepare next bounded visible expansion gate without broad publication.
Mission 002: progress Plex Live TV/DVR attach only if it can be done without disrupting Plex and with rollback.
blocked_while_active_playback: Path mutation, cleanup, deletion, source mutation, broad retries
corrected_success_metric: Visible in Plex and verified playable by the user, not only internal QA passed.
